race.comment: STYLISH SPARKLE (8) unleashed a powerful late burst to score here last month. She's been kept fresh since and with clear running at the right time, she can make it two from two. SAUER (3) took a big step forward second-up here, arriving late to score narrowly. There's more improvement to come, though he'll likely get a long way back from the wide gate. ARTISSI (4) was a strong winner at Gawler last start and while this is tougher, she commands respect. GOOD EXPECTATIONS (6) hasn't been able to match impressive winners in her two runs back but strips fitter and gets weight off. Peaking now and is right in the mix.
